The payout was fast-tracked for compliance because the $850 amount was below the risk threshold and sent to a non-sanctioned country. Treasury approved the immediate payment since the cumulative total remained well within the available headroom.

Consequently, the system fast-tracked the compliance check and authorized the payment as it remained within the available treasury headroom.
